active_constraints.constraint: CAMERA FRAMING MANDATE: Frame root tile using bounding sphere.
ZERO heap allocations in draw() loop.

key_knowledge.knowledge: TilesetLoader uses boundingVolume.sphere for ECEF center.
Standard perspective matrix fails in Reversed-Z pipeline; use makeInfiniteReversedZProjRH.
Spikes caused by (0,0,0) vertices in ECEF are suppressed in TilesetLoader.
